profession_discipline: road logistics, supply accounting, and field coordination
public_reputation: Known around Duneshade Outpost through steady work as a outpost quartermaster.
appearance: Theron Bannerhold usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their zoreth kaeling status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Carries role-shaped habits that make local pressure visible in the way they speak and judge strangers. In Duneshade Outpost, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of a outpost quartermaster in and around Duneshade Outpost, keeping ordinary obligations from turning into public disorder.
current_agenda: Keep Duneshade Outpost workable by absorbing local strain before it becomes a visible scandal, shutdown, or breach of order.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of outpost quartermaster credible while managing pressure tied to status, access, logistics, and local reputation in Duneshade Outpost.

adventure_hooks.summary: Theron Bannerhold can draw the party into a locality problem centered on zoreth kaeling duties in Duneshade Outpost.
Theron Bannerhold becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with water scarcity, subterranean predators, convoy delay around Duneshade Outpost.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: In public, Theron Bannerhold is immediately readable as a zoreth kaeling tied to Duneshade Outpost.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Duneshade Outpost: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Theron Bannerhold presents as someone shaped by the duties of a outpost quartermaster and the daily pressures of Duneshade Outpost.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a outpost quartermaster, and proof that strangers will not make Duneshade Outpost harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Theron Bannerhold refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a zoreth kaeling too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Theron Bannerhold adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Theron Bannerhold always knows more about Duneshade Outpost than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a outpost quartermaster in Duneshade Outpost.
